nativeProps: HTML div attributes except owned children and change handling

enhancements.name: hierarchy summary
enhancements.disabled: false removes the output, description relationship, counts, and accessibility node

enhancements.name: change announcements
enhancements.disabled: false removes the live region and all announcement updates

enhancements.name: optional editing
enhancements.disabled: omitting the callback removes F2 interception, editors, save/cancel UI, pending state, and edit events

enhancements.name: bounded virtual window
enhancements.disabled: false renders every visible hierarchical row without spacers or window events
